summary: Serializes a cookie-style key/value pair with optional attributes into a single header-compatible string after validating inputs.
signature_intent: Accepts an identifier, a value, and optional serialization settings; returns a formatted cookie string or throws on invalid input.
behavior: Uses a default value encoder unless a custom encoder function is supplied.
Encodes the supplied value before serialization.
Rejects a non-empty encoded value containing invalid header content.
Returns the base pair as identifier=value.
Adds Max-Age when provided, coercing it to a number and flooring it.
Adds Domain when provided and valid.
Adds Path when provided and valid.
Adds Expires when provided by calling its UTC string method.
Adds SameSite as Strict, Lax, or None for accepted settings.
edge_cases: Missing settings are treated as empty settings.
An empty encoded value is allowed.
A nonnumeric max age throws an error.
Invalid domain or path content throws a type error.
An expiration value without a UTC string method throws a type error.
Unsupported SameSite values throw a type error.
